The program that I want you to think of us most for is our Owner Occupied No-Income loan.
We have a specific bank designation that allows us to avoid certain portions of the “ability to repay” rules.
We literally don’t ask for income on the 1003 and we won’t ask for tax returns.
It is also NOT a bank statement loan. Minimal documentation. I know it sounds strange but give me a call and I would love to explain it.
If you are having any problems with loans due to income, that is where you should be thinking of me. Reach out any time to go over scenarios.
Easy qualification – Check out our qualifying tool here - https://qualify.quonticwholesale.com/
Up to 75% LTV on purchases and R/T refis. Max LTV on cash out is 65%.
Minimal documentation because of our minimal income requirements
Only 1-month bank statement required to verify assets (this is not a bank statement loan)
100% gift funds allowed for down payment and reserves
Self-employed and wage earners are eligible
15 and 30 year fixed products. 5 and 7 year ARMS available
SFR, condos, PUDs, Co-Ops, 2-4 units, and second homes are eligible.
